title: Invoice payment with hosted page
description: Learn how to create and collect payment on an invoice using a hosted payment page.

nodes.title: Create a test clock
nodes.description: Run this test helper to create a test clock to control time in your test environment.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the helper flow and confirm it advances test state without adding helper-only parameters to application code.

nodes.title: Create a product with a price
nodes.description: Create a product with a default price that will be used for the invoice.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a customer
nodes.description: Create a customer who will receive the invoice. For testing purposes, the customer's email will be your email.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create an invoice
nodes.description: Create an invoice for the customer with a 30-day payment term.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Add an invoice item
nodes.description: Add a line item to the invoice using the product price created earlier.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Send the invoice
nodes.description: Send the invoice to the customer via email.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: View and pay the invoice
nodes.description: Preview the hosted invoice page where customers can view and pay their invoice online. Optionally fill out the form with the card number as 4242 4242 4242 4242. Use a valid future date, such as 12/34, and any three-digit CVC.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Handle invoice payment events
nodes.description: Listen for the invoice.paid event that indicates successful payment.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.
